name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool, agent, or capability
title: "[FEATURE] "

---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or investment workflow limitation.

## Proposed Solution

What tool, agent, or capability would solve this?

## Component

Which part of the system? (MCP tool, agent, pipeline, prompt, etc.)

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or references.
